title: Dexcost Task v1
description: Standard Event Schema v1 — Task payload. Represents a tracked business task with aggregated costs, tokens, and waste metrics.

started_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the task started.

ended_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the task ended, or null if still running.

metadata.description: Caller-defined context (customer tier, ticket id, etc.).

customer_id.description: Denormalised customer identifier for fast queries.

project_id.description: Denormalised project identifier for fast queries.

parent_task_id.description: UUID of the parent task, or null for top-level tasks.

experiment_id.description: Groups tasks into an experiment for variant comparison.

variant.description: Labels which variant this task run belongs to within an experiment.

llm_cost_usd.description: Aggregated LLM cost in USD (Decimal as string).

external_cost_usd.description: Aggregated external service cost in USD (Decimal as string).

compute_cost_usd.description: Aggregated compute cost in USD (Decimal as string).

network_cost_usd.description: Aggregated cloud-egress cost in USD (Decimal as string). Distinct from external_cost_usd, which captures vendor API fees — see spec Decision #7.

total_cost_usd.description: Total aggregated cost in USD (Decimal as string).

total_input_tokens.description: Total input tokens across all LLM events.

total_output_tokens.description: Total output tokens across all LLM events.

total_cached_tokens.description: Total cached tokens across all LLM events.

retry_count.description: Number of retried events in this task.

retry_cost_usd.description: Aggregated retry waste in USD (Decimal as string).

failure_count.description: Number of failed events in this task.

network_bytes_in.description: Total bytes received across all HTTP responses for this task.

network_bytes_out.description: Total bytes sent across all HTTP requests for this task.

network_call_count.description: Total number of outbound HTTP calls recorded for this task.

network_by_host.description: Per-host breakdown of network usage, shape {"hosts": [...]} capped at 20 entries plus an _other overflow bucket.

schema_version.description: Schema version — always '1' for v1 payloads.
